style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as three equal panels side by side. Left panel titled WARRIOR with a simple shield icon, listing SHIP, SPEED, LEADERBOARD, and a small tag at its base reading AI FACTORY. Centre panel titled WIZARD with a simple stars icon, listing STRATEGIZE, MODERNIZE, ARCHITECT, with a base tag reading GOVERNMENT 3.0. Right panel titled CRAFTSPERSON with a simple hammer icon, listing BUILD FOR OTHERS, HARNESSES, TEMPLATES, with a base tag reading PRONGHORN, NEXUS, VELOCITY. The three panels are balanced and equal in weight. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: panel 'GUERRIER' (LIVRER, VITESSE, TABLEAU DE CLASSEMENT, tag 'USINE D'IA'); panel 'MAGICIEN' (ÉLABORER LA STRATÉGIE, MODERNISER, ARCHITECTURER, tag 'GOUVERNEMENT 3.0'); panel 'ARTISAN' (CONSTRUIRE POUR LES AUTRES, HARNAIS, GABARITS, tag 'PRONGHORN, NEXUS, VELOCITY'). All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
